subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablí-Rahím! Thou hast attained unto the Most Great Vision and the favors of the All-Powerful Lord of Destiny. Prize thou this most exalted station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل رحیم فائز شدی بمنظر اکبر و عنایت مالک قدر قدر اینمقام اعلی را
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
